title: Sales Performance Analysis
description: Clean a sales dataset, calculate regional performance and write three business observations.
milestones: Remove duplicates and handle missing values
Calculate revenue by region and product
starterCode:
import pandas as pd

sales = pd.DataFrame({
    'order_id':[101,102,102,103,104,105],
    'region':['North','South','South','West','North','South'],
    'product':['A','B','B','A','C','A'],
    'revenue':[250,300,300,None,450,380]
})

title: Customer Orders SQL Analysis
description: Combine customer and order data, rank customers and identify inactive accounts.
starterCode:
import sqlite3
import pandas as pd

conn = sqlite3.connect(':memory:')
customers = pd.DataFrame({'customer_id':[1,2,3,4], 'name':['Asha','Ben','Cara','Dev']})
orders = pd.DataFrame({'customer_id':[1,1,3], 'amount':[200,350,500]})
customers.to_sql('customers', conn, index=False)
orders.to_sql('orders', conn, index=False)

# Begin your SQL analysis below

title: Python Analytics Capstone
description: Build a complete analytics workflow that cleans data, queries it with SQL, validates results and produces an executive summary.
milestones: Load and clean the supplied dataset
Create at least two data-quality checks
Load the clean data into SQLite
Write one aggregation query and one join
Add at least three automated assertions
starterCode:
import sqlite3
import pandas as pd
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

customers = pd.DataFrame({
    'customer_id':[1,2,3,4],
    'name':['Asha','Ben','Cara','Dev'],
    'region':['North','South','North','West']
})
orders = pd.DataFrame({
    'order_id':[101,102,102,103,104],
    'customer_id':[1,2,2,3,4],
    'revenue':[250,300,300,None,450]
})
